visualizerParams.title: Arithmetic Mean Integer Division Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The mean calculation seems to be producing incorrect, whole number results when the average should be a fraction. In older versions of Python, this was a common issue. Ensure it works correctly in Python 3. Fix the potential bug.

solution.explanation: The buggy code used floor division (`//`), which truncates the result to an integer (e.g., 3/2 becomes 1). For an accurate mean, standard float division (`/`) should be used to preserve fractional parts.
